abstract: Structured design critique framework using eight-dimension scoring system (typography, color, spacing, hierarchy, consistency, accessibility, performance, emotional impact). Produces a weighted Design Quality Score (DQS) ranging from 0-100 with interpretation guide (90+ ship-ready, 75-89 good with fixes, 60-74 needs work, below 60 major redesign). Includes first-impression protocol, dimension-specific evaluation checklists, fix priority framework (critical/high/medium/low), comprehensive DQS report template, and three detailed case study examples. Separates measurable quality criteria from subjective taste. Suitable for pre-launch reviews, client feedback sessions, self-assessment, competitor analysis, design system audits, and design training.
